subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Kingdom of Abhá and art enkindled with the fire of the love of God! Thy letter was perused, and its fragrances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت ابهی و مشتعل بنار محبت الله مسطورات آنجناب تلاوت شد و نفحات
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
